completed_tasks.name: Pause bug investigated on Pi — reproduced (15/20 at track transitions, 7/20 rapid pause/resume)
Pause guard implemented — per-client timer chain re-applies swallowed pauses
Code review (4 angles + verifier) — 5 findings fixed
v2.1.7 released — CI build + repo.xml SHA updated
Tested on Pi (chilly) — Test 1: 0/10, Test 2: 5/10 false re-pauses (known limit)
GH #88 closed (CDN fix confirmed by OXipro)
GH #52 closed (K8s credentials confirmed fixed by jmccoy555)
GH #86 + #85 replied — Custom Client ID + Premium requirement explained
TROUBLESHOOTING.md — Custom Client ID entry + CDN 404 entry added
README.md — Developer App Premium requirement noted
Forum monitor workflow — state now committed back to repo
Forum triage — gegen #119: positive CDN fix feedback, no reply needed
Memory updated: forum state path (local runner), docs review on pause, pause DIAG cleanup

decisions.decision: Pause guard via timer chain (2.5s initial, 1s recheck, 5s max)
decisions.rationale: LMS [['playlist'],['pause']] subscription doesn't fire for resume events — can't reliably detect user resume within <2s. Timer approach is the best available workaround at plugin level.

decisions.decision: Quick resume false re-pause accepted as known limit
decisions.rationale: 5/10 in stress test, but extremely unlikely in real usage (user pauses then resumes within 1s). Test 1 (realistic) = 0/10.

decisions.decision: Custom Client ID: recommended but requires Premium
decisions.rationale: Bundled token works without, but own app gives dedicated quota. Premium requirement is Spotify-side since Feb 2026.

next_action: Warten auf urknall Rückmeldung (#85/#86 Custom Client ID). Pause guard DIAG-Logging entfernen wenn Bug als gelöst gilt (siehe Memory pause-diag-cleanup). Upstream librespot Release beobachten. Backlog: Library Integration (#32), Search Pagination (#7), Spotty Migration (#6).
context_notes: v2.1.7 shipped mit Pause Guard. Alle Issues triagiert. Forum Monitor committed jetzt State ins Repo. Pause guard hat bekanntes Limit bei schnellem Resume (<2s) — LMS-Architektur-Limitation, kein Plugin-Level-Fix möglich.
